zh.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II是Walter Loudham I和Dama En Blanco的兒子，於1242年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾。他於1264年與Joan Tregoz在英國諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年12月14日在英國諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II是Walter Loudham I和Dama En Blanco的儿子，于1242年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾。他于1264年与Joan Tregoz在英国諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1306年12月14日在英国諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Loudham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II was born in 1242, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England as the son of Walter Loudham I and Dama En Blanco. He married Joan Tregoz in 1264, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 December 1306, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II est né en 1242, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Walter Loudham I et Dama En Blanco. Il a épousé Joan Tregoz en 1264, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1306, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II wurde 1242 in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, als Sohn von Walter Loudham I und Dama En Blanco geboren. Er hat 1264 in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England Joan Tregoz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1306 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II è nato il nel 1242 nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England come figlio di Walter Loudham I e Dama En Blanco. Lui sposato Joan Tregoz nel 1264, nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 dicembre 1306, nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham IIは1242年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルでWalter Loudham IとDama En Blancoの息子として生まれた。1264年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムでJoan Tregozと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年12月14日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II(은)는 1242년 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 Walter Loudham I(와)과 Dama En Blanco의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1264년 영국 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 Joan Tregoz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 12월 14일 영국 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II nasceu em 1242, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Walter Loudham I e Dama En Blanco. Ele casou-se com Joan Tregoz em 1264, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1306, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Loudham II родился в 1242 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Walter Loudham I и Dama En Blanco. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Tregoz в 1264 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 декабря 1306 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.
